behaviors.description: The speech-to-text output preserves speaker labels so that the summary can attribute statements to specific attendees.
behaviors.justification: Pass 1 dependency: real AI/ML diarization quality from the speech-to-text model. MOCK-MISS: this is not just local parsing logic; failure appears when real STT labeling is wrong or unstable on real audio. REAL-INFRA alone is insufficient (real HTTP can pass while labels are still wrong), so System is not enough. LLM-DEP/ML-DEP is yes because correctness depends on model output quality. Rejection gate: Workflow was considered, but behavior text focuses on preserving STT speaker labels; it does not require validating multiple agentic stages in sequence.
behaviors.test_description: Run a real multi-speaker meeting audio through the production STT API with speaker-label output enabled, then verify transcript utterances retain correct attendee labels against a labeled ground-truth slice and confirm downstream attribution uses those labels.

behaviors.description: The structured summary contains at least one action item for every attendee who was assigned a task during the meeting.
behaviors.justification: Pass 1 dependency: real LLM extraction/completeness quality. MOCK-HIDE: stubbing the model would always return expected action items and hide misses. MULTI-STEP is not required for minimum coverage because this can be tested by supplying a fixed transcript directly to summarization. Rejection gate: Workflow was considered, but behavior text only requires summary coverage of assigned tasks, which can be evaluated in a single real model step.
behaviors.test_description: Provide transcripts with known attendee-task assignments to the real summarization model and assert each assigned attendee appears with at least one action item in structured output.

behaviors.description: Key decisions mentioned in the transcript appear in the "decisions" section of the summary, not buried in the narrative.
behaviors.justification: Pass 1 dependency: real LLM judgment about salience and section placement. MOCK-MISS: module wiring tests can confirm schema fields exist but cannot catch decision omission/misplacement quality failures. Integration brake: no required real OS/subprocess boundary; core risk is model output quality. Rejection gate: Workflow was considered, but behavior text targets one summarization outcome (placement into "decisions"), not a multi-agentic chain.
behaviors.test_description: Send transcripts containing explicit decision statements to the real summarizer and verify those decisions are present in the structured "decisions" field and not only in free-form narrative text.

behaviors.description: When the audio file is longer than 60 minutes, the service splits it into segments and processes them sequentially, merging the results into a single coherent summary.
behaviors.justification: Pass 1 dependency: multiple agentic steps in sequence (segment-level transcription/summarization plus merge coherence). MULTI-STEP is explicitly yes in behavior text: "splits... processes sequentially... merging results." MOCK-HIDE: mocking segment outputs can hide cross-segment coherence and ordering failures. Integration/System alone are too low because they miss real model drift across segments.
behaviors.test_description: Run a real >60-minute recording through the production pipeline, confirm segmenting and sequential processing occur, then evaluate final merged summary for cross-segment coherence, no dropped sections, and preserved action/decision continuity.

behaviors.description: The full pipeline — upload audio, transcribe, summarize, deliver structured output — completes without manual intervention for a real meeting recording.
behaviors.justification: Pass 1 dependency: end-to-end pipeline with multiple real agentic stages and real infrastructure boundaries. REAL-INFRA is yes (upload/delivery/network), LLM-DEP/ML-DEP is yes (transcribe/summarize quality), and MULTI-STEP is yes by explicit full-pipeline scope. Rejection gate: no higher level exists than Workflow under provided level defs.
behaviors.test_description: Execute an end-to-end run on a real meeting recording in a production-like environment: upload file, invoke real STT, invoke real summarizer, and verify structured output delivery succeeds automatically with no operator intervention or manual retries.
